profile.title: Profile

profile.avatarHint: Supports JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP formats, max 5MB

profile.invalidImageType: Please upload a valid image file
profile.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters

avatar.label: Avatar
avatar.hint: Supports JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP formats, max 5MB
avatar.invalidType: Please upload a valid image file (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP)

notifications.title: Notification Settings
notifications.subtitle: Manage how you receive notifications
notifications.browserPermissionDenied: Browser notification permission denied. Please allow notifications in browser settings.
notifications.permissionDeniedHint: Notification permission denied, please allow in browser settings
notifications.alertNotificationsDesc: Configure notification methods for price alerts
notifications.alertTriggerNotificationDesc: Send notification when price alert is triggered
notifications.priceChangeNotificationDesc: Auto-notify when price change exceeds threshold
notifications.enablePriceChangeNotificationDesc: Notify when price change exceeds set threshold
notifications.changeThresholdHint: Send notification when price changes more than this percentage in a short time

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Customize default application behavior
preferences.defaultOracleHint: Default oracle to display when opening oracle page
preferences.defaultSymbolHint: Default trading pair for price queries
preferences.defaultTimeRangeHint: Default time range for chart display
preferences.defaultCurrencyHint: Default currency unit for price display
preferences.autoRefreshIntervalHint: Time interval for automatic data refresh

data.title: Data Management
data.subtitle: Export and manage your data
data.exportUserDataDesc: Export your profile, favorites, alerts, and snapshots data
data.exportSnapshotsDesc: Export all your saved price snapshots
data.clearDataWarning: Clearing local data will delete your preferences and cached data, but will not affect server data.
data.clearLocalDataConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all local data? This will clear your preferences and cached data.
data.clearLocalDataError: Failed to clear, please try again
data.deleteAccountWarning: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your data, including profile, favorites, alerts, and snapshots. This action cannot be undone.
data.deleteAccountConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone!
data.deleteAccountError: Failed to delete account, please contact administrator
